projectsList.title: FPV40 Campus — LMS Platform for FPV Pilots
projectsList.role: Full-stack Developer / Tech Lead / Platform Architect
projectsList.description: Full-featured LMS platform with microservices architecture for online FPV drone pilot training. 16 modules, 134+ lessons, 30+ interactive React components, progress system, certificates, and YooKassa billing.
features: 4 microservices: auth (JWT/RBAC/Google OAuth), core (modules/quizzes/progress/XP), media (MinIO/S3), Telegram monitoring bot
30+ custom interactive React components: DroneDiagram, BetaflightMap, PidTuningViz, LipoChargeViz, and more
YooKassa payment integration: 'Pilot Start' (9,900 ₽) and 'Pilot Pro' (19,900 ₽) plans with webhook processing
Certificate generation with guilloche border, Russian coat of arms, custom CSS overlay
CI/CD: GitHub Actions (develop→dev, main→prod), 7 Docker containers, automated DB backup

projectsList.title: FPV40.ru — Corporate Website for Pilot School
projectsList.description: Multi-page corporate website for FPV pilot school with full CMS admin panel for content, pricing, and SEO management. Next.js + PostgreSQL, SMTP integration, Docker deployment.
features: Full CMS admin panel: manage pages, pricing, courses, SEO meta tags
SMTP integration for applications and notifications

projectsList.title: Viably — AI Product Platform
projectsList.role: Backend Engineer / Tech Lead / Platform Architect
projectsList.description: AI platform for generating and deploying digital products: websites, web apps, and bots. Built and stabilized backend, generation pipeline, preview runtime, deployment flow, OAuth, billing, and production infrastructure.
features: AI generation pipeline for websites, webapps, and bots
Preview/render runtime with correct artifact deployment
FastAPI + Next.js + PostgreSQL + Redis + Docker architecture

projectsList.title: Vibegent — Multi-tenant AI Agent Platform
projectsList.role: Platform Architect / Backend Engineer / AI Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Production platform for user AI agents with credit system, LLM proxying, billing, Telegram interfaces, worker nodes, and Hetzner deployment infrastructure.
features: Multi-tenant architecture with per-user agent isolation
Credit system: plans, packs, balance enforcement, YooKassa
LLM proxy between agents and model providers
Telegram bot + support bot + channel infrastructure
Hetzner worker nodes: remote Docker deploy, autoscaling, DB tracking

projectsList.title: vibegent-proxy — LLM Infrastructure Layer
projectsList.description: Resilient proxy layer between AI agents and Anthropic API: token rotation, per-token backoff, retry/fallback, credit-aware request control. Managing model access as production infrastructure.
features: Architecture: Agent → vibegent-proxy → Anthropic (legacy complexity removed)
Token pool management with rotation across organizations
Per-token backoff instead of global cooldown
Retry/fallback on rate-limit, stop-on-zero balance mechanics
Security and audit layers, balance/credits control

projectsList.title: Agent Cloud — Hetzner Deploy Infrastructure
projectsList.description: Cloud infrastructure for deploying AI agents on dedicated Hetzner worker nodes: remote Docker orchestration, autoscaling, workload isolation, and DB-tracked deployments.
features: Dedicated Hetzner worker nodes for user agents
Remote Docker deployment over SSH, no local deployment on backend hosts
DB-tracked deployments, workload isolation (websites vs agents)
Node allocation logic and scheduling rules

projectsList.title: OpenClaw — Agent Runtime Operations
projectsList.description: Deployment, customization, and production stabilization of OpenClaw as an agent operating environment: gateway, browser, messaging, memory, model auth, and persistent sessions.
features: Deployment and operationalization of OpenClaw environments
Model auth and agent defaults configuration
Production debugging: runtime, browser/auth, agent behavior fixes

projectsList.title: ChainAlert - Blockchain Transaction Monitoring
projectsList.description: B2B/B2C SaaS platform for real-time Ethereum transaction monitoring with Telegram notifications
features: Telegram Bot Interface for wallet and settings management
Customizable alert thresholds based on transaction amounts
Subscription-based model with three pricing tiers
Track up to 50 wallets per account (Pro plan)

projectsList.title: Telegram Chat Analyzer - AI Portfolio Generator
projectsList.description: Automated tool for generating developer portfolio from Telegram chat exports using Claude AI
features: Automatic Telegram export (JSON) analysis via Claude API
Extract professional experience, projects, and skills from conversations
Detailed token usage and cost statistics
Automatic large file handling (skip chats >180K tokens)
Portfolio export in JSON and Markdown formats
